actions.message: Clear the patio — break crates for supplies.
📦 THOSE CRATES CAN BE BROKEN — SMASH THEM FOR SUPPLIES!
North gate's locked — find the key (west).
Find the key — west yard, behind the crates.
Chainsaw! Shred the big ones — and the crates.
Hold the arena — cute and roided, mixed.
Last stand — clear them and get out.

stages.message: 🐰 DUSK — AND THEY'RE STIRRING. CLEAR THE YARD!
🐰 THEY'RE ON THE PATIO — SMASH THE CRATES FOR SUPPLIES!
😡 SOMETHING BIGGER — A ROIDED ONE! FIND THE KEY (WEST)!
🪚 PUT THE SAW TO WORK — CLEAR THE ARENA!
TWO BIG ONES — GRIND THEM DOWN!
🌑 NIGHT'S HERE — LAST STAND. HOLD THE YARD!
GET OUT WHILE YOU CAN — FINISH THEM!

keyLocks.speaker: Nat
keyLocks.armText: Locked. There's a key back in the west yard — behind those crates. Go get it.
keyLocks.unlockText: Got it. Gate's open — keep moving, it's getting dark.
